raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current footing","name":"What's feeling solid in your design work right now, Sam?","description":"Establishes Sam's present operating base before moving into stretch or change.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretching edge","name":"Where is your design craft stretching you most at the moment?","description":"Surfaces the part of the craft that feels newly demanding rather than routine.","purpose":"competency","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next scope","name":"What kind of design scope would feel meaningfully bigger to you next?","description":"Gets concrete about the shape of the next stretch without jumping straight to a role title.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work that counts","name":"Which kinds of outcomes do you want your design work to influence more directly?","description":"Clarifies the business or product outcomes Sam wants to be closer to.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback loop","name":"How is the feedback you get changing the work you ship?","description":"Looks at whether critique is actually improving decisions and quality.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Influence gap","name":"Where does stakeholder influence break down for you most often?","description":"Finds the specific point where design intent loses force outside the design team.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoffs ahead","name":"What would you need to trade off to take on a bigger design scope?","description":"Forces a real view of time, focus, and competing responsibilities.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What kind of support from me would actually change your trajectory here?","description":"Surfaces the manager's role in enabling the next step without making it generic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next move","name":"What is the first concrete step you want to take before we talk again?","description":"Closes on one committed action that advances the growth conversation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
